subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been read before the Throne, and We have accepted what thou didst intend in the path of God, the Lord of the worlds. Rejoice thou in what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قرء کتابک لدی العرش و قبلنا ما اردت فی سبیل الله رب العالمین ان افرح بما
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
